name: Kaiju Girl TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, Macro)
Be careful what you wish for! You asked for a new perspective, and so you shall receive one!
...In a manner of speaking.
Transformed into a big, busty kaiju girl, you'll now have to navigate life as a titanic monster, just like the ones you see in the news- only much, much cuter! Will you manage to befriend the people of the city, or be forced to fight for your life?
It's up to you!
creator: Orbital_Lithium
